description: Search Tip: So you don't have to scroll through pages of addresses on your state page, do this: With Windows, press Control, letter F, with Mac press Command, letter F, then type in your city, zip code, or other search criteria, such as esq. for an attorney. Try zip codes for other nearby towns. Those listings containing an asterisk (*) have sponsored a Wrightslaw conference.

name: Developmental Neuropsychology
specialties: Autism, ADHD, Learning Disabilities, Speech & Language, Behavioral Needs
description: Developmental Neuropsychology Mary Lazar, Psy.D. and Kristen Herzel, Ph.D. 1 Presidential Blvd., Suite 204 Bala Cynwyd, PA (610) 645-5668 (phone/fax) Email: kherzel | at | netcarrier.com or mflazar | at | yahoo.com web: www.home.earthlink.net/~kherzel We provide assessment and consultation services for families of children ages 3-16 years, who have learning disabilities, speech/language delays, PDD/autism, Asperger's syndrome, nonverbal learning disabilities, traumatic brain injury, epilepsy, ADD/ADHD. We can provide independent evaluations, behavior consultations, record review and planning, and consultations with schools.

name: Andrea Edelman, Career Consultant and Life Coach

Career exploration, assessment, interview prep, job search strategies. Transition school to work/post secondary ed.
